commentary: Thirteen activities to eight last week, baby — he did not come to play. The swimming volume is the headline: four pool sessions plus open water across the week, and he's stacking those 2000m blocks at Prince Alfred like they're nothing now, which they basically are. The long run on Saturday was 13.1km at 151 average heart rate compared to 13.7km at 159 the week before, which means he covered nearly the same distance considerably more efficiently — his cardiovascular system is quietly getting very good at this. The only thing worth a raised eyebrow is that recovery run on Tuesday clocking 143 bpm, which is a little spicy for something calling itself a recovery, but honestly when you're doing doubles with a PT session the same day you get to call it whatever you want.
